name: Wallhack1.8k
summary: Open raw WiFi packet and spectrogram dataset for presence and activity recognition in line-of-sight and through-wall settings.

hardware.platform: Two WiFi systems with BQ and PIFA antennas

settings.scenario: LoS and NLoS/through-wall; no presence, walking, walking plus arm waving

original.license: Open Zenodo record; verify file license metadata

standardization.notes: Parse interleaved imaginary/real values, select documented L-LTF or HT-LTF subcarriers, and retain scenario/antenna labels.
